name: Kanape Me Zampon 1 (Zampon Canape, 1)
recipeIngredient: 6 Buttered bread rounds with crusts removed.
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the zampon into horn shapes.
2. Add mayonnaise (or butter) to the hard cooked eggs then add chopped pickle (or relish); mix well.
3. Stuff the zampon horns with the filling.
4. Place the stuffed zampon horns on the bread rounds.
